T0164.title: Social Data Pull
T0164.definition: In underground data trading, an illegal operation that uses technical tools to export private data such as chat logs and contact lists from mainstream social platforms.
T0164.description: In underground data trading, an illegal operation that uses technical tools to export private data such as chat logs and contact lists from mainstream social platforms.
T0164.usageExample: "Exclusive forced extraction, micro-extraction without notes, comes with all social platform accounts, no conversion needed, with avatars, document receipt. Don't report sensitive stuff."
